Video.summary: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany

Video.summary: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 7, Bulgaria

Video.summary: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 8, England

Video.summary: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 9, Finland

Video.summary: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms

Video.summary: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland

Video.summary: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria

Video.summary: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia

Video.summary: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia

Video.summary: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria

Video.summary: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania

Video.summary: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship

Image.alt: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship

Video.summary: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania

Video.summary: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal

Video.summary: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique

Video.summary: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey

Image.alt: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey

Video.summary: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking

Video.summary: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship

Image.alt: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship

Video.summary: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland

Video.summary: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia

Video.summary: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.
Video.title: SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 6, Serbia

Video.summary: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.
Video.title: Stage 14 - SOUTH AFRICA - 2024

Video.summary: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland

Video.summary: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.
Video.title: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship

Image.alt: SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
